Script Content: Hi! I'm [Name] from [Agency]. I'm working with several families in Punggol who are upgrading to condos, and I'm seeing some really exciting opportunities in the area right now. Do you have a quick moment to chat about what's happening with property values here?
Notes: High energy, mentions social proof (several families), curiosity hook

Script Content: Your block just completed MOP recently right? I've seen similar units sell 15% higher than 2 years ago. With the new amenities coming to Punggol, this might be the perfect timing to explore your options.
Notes: Data-driven, creates urgency, specific to Punggol

Script Content: I'd love to show you what your neighbours are achieving. Can we schedule a quick 20-minute chat at the sales gallery this Saturday? I'll bring recent comparable sales specifically for your block.
Notes: Low pressure, specific time, value offer

Script Content: Good evening. I'm [Name], a property consultant specializing in mature estates like Serangoon. I've been analyzing market trends here and noticed some interesting patterns that might affect homeowners. Would you be open to a brief conversation?
Notes: Calm, professional, positions as advisor not salesperson

Script Content: Serangoon has always been a stable estate, but with the Cross Island Line coming and several en-bloc opportunities nearby, we're seeing a shift. Many long-time owners are reviewing their portfolios. Have you considered how these changes might affect your property value?
Notes: Mentions infrastructure, en-bloc, triggers FOMO subtly

Script Content: I'd be happy to prepare a personalized market report for your specific unit type. No obligation - just information to help you make informed decisions. Can I email that to you along with my contact details?
Notes: Low pressure, positions as service, captures contact

Script Content: I completely understand. Most homeowners weren't looking to sell until they saw the current market data. Would it be alright if I left you with a recent market report for this area? It shows what similar units sold for recently - takes just 2 minutes to glance through.
Of course, evenings are precious. I just need 30 seconds - would a brief market update be helpful for your weekend reading? I can WhatsApp it to you, and if you have questions later, I'm available.
Notes: Respects time, offers async option, captures contact

Script Content: That's great that you have representation. Many homeowners work with multiple agents to ensure they see all opportunities. Would you like a second opinion on current market conditions? No obligation - just another perspective.
Notes: Delicate, positions as second opinion not replacement

Script Content: [Pause 3 seconds] I know this might seem unexpected. I'm not here to pressure you - just sharing information. If now isn't a good time, I can leave my card and some market data. What's best for you?
Notes: Gives control back, respectful, still captures contact

Script Content: That makes sense - it's a big decision. May I ask what's the main thing you're considering? Sometimes I can provide specific information that helps with that exact concern.
